title: DHS Madurai Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 82 Medical Officer, Pharmacist and Other Posts
description: District Health Society Madurai (DHS Madurai) has issued the official notification for the recruitment of 82 Medical Officers, Staff Nurses, Multipurpose Workers, Pharmacists, and other posts. Candidates who have qualified in MBBS, GNM, B.Sc Nursing, M.Sc Nursing, Any Degree, 08th, Diploma, B.Pharm, M.Pharm, and ANM can use this opportunity and apply for the DHS Madurai Notification 2026 . Here we have included the age limit, selection process, salary structure, education details, application...
